hero.description: Access thousands of Turkish online stores. We provide you with a local address, consolidate your packages, and ship them to Kuwait and beyond.
hero.imageAlt: Woman shopping carrying bags in a modern mall setting

trending.label: TRENDING NOW
trending.title: Istanbul Fashion Week Collection
trending.description: Shop the latest trends from boutiques in Nisantasi and Galata.

cards.startShoppingDescription: Instantly get a locker address in Istanbul to use for your online shopping.
cards.conciergeDescription: Can't pay with your card? Send us the link and we'll purchase it for you.

process.label: Simple Process
process.title: From Turkey to Your Doorstep
process.description: We handle the logistics so you can enjoy the shopping. Here is how Postam makes international shopping effortless.

steps.title: Register Free
steps.description: Sign up in seconds and receive your personal Turkish shipping address instantly.

steps.title: Shop Boutiques
steps.description: Use your new address at checkout on Trendyol, Hepsiburada, and more.

steps.title: We Consolidate
steps.description: Combine multiple packages into one box to save up to 80% on shipping costs.

steps.title: Fast Delivery
steps.description: Receive your goods in Kuwait within 2-4 business days via express carriers.

buyForMe.title: Buy For Me Service
buyForMe.description: Found something you love but the store doesn't accept your card? Paste the product link below, and we'll buy it for you.
buyForMe.supportedStores: Supported stores: Trendyol, Hepsiburada, Zara TR, Massimo Dutti TR, and 50+ more.

testimonials.quote: I used Postam for my Black Friday shopping from Turkey. The consolidation service saved me so much on shipping to Kuwait City. Arrived in just 3 days!
testimonials.name: Ali Al-Sabah

testimonials.quote: The Buy For Me service is a lifesaver. I wanted a specific coffee set from a local Turkish artisan who didn't ship internationally. Postam handled everything.
testimonials.name: Fatima Hassan

testimonials.quote: Great customer support. I had an issue with a damaged item from the seller, and Postam helped me return it before shipping it to me. Very trustworthy.
testimonials.name: Mohammad K.

about.description: Your reliable bridge between Turkey and the world. We make international shopping simple, secure, and affordable for everyone in the Gulf region.

blog.description: Discover stores, shipping guides, and practical tips for buying from Turkey and receiving in Kuwait.
blog.noResults: No posts matched your search. Try another keyword or category.
blog.newsletterTitle: Never Miss a Deal from Turkey
blog.newsletterDescription: Join thousands of shoppers and receive updates about sales, stores, and shipping tips.

helpCenter.supportDescription: Our support team is available 24/7 to assist you with any questions.
helpCenter.cantFind: Can't find what you're looking for?
helpCenter.supportCta: Our support team is available 24/7 to help you with your requests.
helpCenter.noArticles: No articles in this category yet.

aboutUs.heroTitle: Your Bridge Between Turkey and the World
aboutUs.heroDescription: Postam was founded with a single mission: make international shopping from Turkey as easy as ordering from a local store. We serve thousands of shoppers across Kuwait, the UAE, and Saudi Arabia every month.
aboutUs.missionDescription: To empower shoppers in the Gulf region with seamless access to Turkey's thriving retail market — from fashion and electronics to home goods and artisan products.
aboutUs.visionDescription: A world where geography is no barrier to commerce. We are building the infrastructure for cross-border shopping to be as simple as buying something around the corner.

values.title: Transparency
values.description: No hidden fees. Our pricing is clear from the moment you request a quote to the second your parcel arrives.

values.title: Speed
values.description: Express delivery in as little as 2 business days. We move fast because we know you can't wait.

values.title: Trust
values.description: Your packages are inspected, photographed, and packed securely. We treat your orders like our own.

values.title: Support
values.description: A real human is available 24/7 via WhatsApp and email. No bots, no ticket queues.

aboutUs.ctaTitle: Ready to Start Shopping from Turkey?
aboutUs.ctaDescription: Join thousands of customers who get the best of Turkey delivered to their door.

careers.heroTitle: Build the Future of Cross-Border Commerce
careers.heroDescription: We are a fast-moving team connecting shoppers in the Gulf region to the best of Turkey. Come build with us.
careers.perksSubtitle: We offer more than just a job — we offer a chance to shape how millions of people shop internationally.

perks.title: Remote-Friendly
perks.description: Work from Istanbul, Kuwait City, or anywhere in between. We trust you to get the job done.

perks.title: Competitive Pay
perks.description: We benchmark salaries against top regional tech companies and review them annually.

perks.title: Health Coverage
perks.description: Comprehensive health insurance for you and your dependents from day one.

perks.title: Growth Opportunities
perks.description: We are scaling fast. Early team members grow into leadership roles as the company expands.

perks.title: Learning Budget
perks.description: $1,000 per year to spend on courses, conferences, or books. We invest in your growth.

perks.title: Team Retreats
perks.description: Twice-yearly team gatherings between Istanbul and Kuwait City to connect and recharge.

careers.openPositionsSubtitle: Browse our current openings and find the role that fits you best.
careers.noOpenings: No open positions right now. Check back soon or send us your CV at careers@postam.com.
careers.ctaDescription: We are always looking for talented people. Send us your CV and tell us how you can contribute.
careers.notRightRoleDescription: Explore all our open positions and find the perfect fit for your skills.

pricing.metaDescription: Choose the pricing plan that fits your shipping and shopping needs.

contactUs.heroDescription: Have a question about your shipment, a service inquiry, or just want to say hello? Our team is available around the clock and happy to assist.

channels.title: WhatsApp Support
channels.description: Chat with a real agent in seconds. Available 24/7 for urgent shipping questions.

channels.title: Email Us
channels.description: Send us a detailed message and we'll reply within 4 business hours.

channels.title: Call Us
channels.description: Speak directly with our Kuwait City support team during business hours.

contactUs.formSubtitle: Fill out the form and we'll get back to you within one business day.
